message:
feat(scan): add docker-compose extractor

Implements git_safety_guard-fu8:
- Add is_docker_compose_path() for file detection (docker-compose.yml,
  docker-compose.yaml, compose.yml, compose.yaml - case insensitive)
- Add extract_docker_compose_from_str() to extract command/entrypoint/
  healthcheck.test values
- Skip environment, labels, volumes, ports, networks, depends_on sections
  to prevent false positives
- Wire into scan_paths() router
- Add 9 tests covering inline/array/entrypoint extraction, environment/
  labels skip, healthcheck, empty files

All 701 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
